docshub.title: Documentation Hub
docshub.description: Every doc across every entity, organized by the frontmatter they carry.
docshub.doc_count: {count, plural, =0 {No docs} one {1 doc} other {{count} docs}}
docshub.subtitle_count: {total, plural, =0 {No docs} one {1 doc} other {{total} docs}} across {entityCount, plural, =0 {no entities} one {1 entity} other {{entityCount} entities}}
docshub.frontmatter_hint.label: Only docs with YAML frontmatter appear here.
docshub.frontmatter_hint.body: Add a frontmatter block at the top of any markdown file in your repository. Docs without a category are skipped during indexing.
docshub.frontmatter_hint.footer: Required: title, category. Optional: description, related_entities.
docshub.toolbar.placeholder: Search docs by title, description, or entity…
docshub.chip.more_help: Less-used categories collapsed beyond the top 8.
docshub.summary.showing: Showing {count, plural, one {1 doc} other {{count} docs}} in {label}{q, select, undefined {} other { matching “{q}”}}
docshub.empty.cold.heading: No documentation indexed yet
docshub.empty.cold.help: Connect a repository with markdown files containing YAML frontmatter, or wait for the next crawler run.
docshub.empty.filtered.heading: No matches
docshub.empty.filtered.help: Try clearing the search, the category, or both.
docshub.time.minutes_ago: {n, plural, one {1 min ago} other {{n} min ago}}
docshub.time.hours_ago: {n, plural, one {1 hr ago} other {{n} hr ago}}
docshub.time.days_ago: {n, plural, one {1 day ago} other {{n} days ago}}
docshub.time.months_ago: {n, plural, one {1 mo ago} other {{n} mo ago}}
docshub.cache_note: Recently indexed docs may take up to 5 minutes to appear.
docs.sidebar.empty.guide_help: This repository has no mkdocs.yml. The Files view shows every markdown file directly.
docs.sidebar.more_files: {count, plural, one {1 more file in repo} other {{count} more files in repo}}
docs.sidebar.not_in_guide: Not in mkdocs.yml. Viewing as file.
